description: Multi-agent system that plans research questions, retrieves papers, summarises findings, synthesises insights, and writes structured reports with citations.

agents.name: Research Planner
agents.role: Decomposes the question into sub-questions and search plan

agents.name: Paper Retriever
agents.role: Retrieves papers via Semantic Scholar with sample fallback

agents.name: Insight Critic
agents.role: Synthesises across papers, flags themes and gaps

agents.name: Report Writer
agents.role: Produces the final structured research report
